package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for bindquery_into_map_any_hot_endpoint: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that bind query parameters into map[string]any or map[string]interface{} on hot request paths.
type CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointModel
}

type CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointService struct {
    repo *CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpoint(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBindqueryIntoMapAnyHotEndpointDTO) error {
    focus := "bindquery_into_map_any_hot"
    _ = focus
    raw, _ := c.GetRawData()
    var body map[string]any
    c.ShouldBindJSON(&body)
    _ = raw
    bindquery_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive := map[string]int{"bindquery": 1, "map": 2, "any": 3, "hot": 4, "endpoint": 5}
    bindquery_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bindquery_positive_0 := bindquery_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["bindquery"] + len(input)
    _ = bindquery_positive_0
    map_positive_1 := bindquery_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_positive_1
    any_positive_2 := bindquery_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["any"] + len(input)
    _ = any_positive_2
    hot_positive_3 := bindquery_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_positive_3
    endpoint_positive_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = endpoint_positive_4
    return nil
}
